description: Triage classifier eval — EASY. Clear meaningful conversations vs obvious filler/noise.

cases.text: So we need to finalize the budget by Friday and send it to the finance team for approval.
I think we should move the launch date to next quarter because the QA team found critical bugs.
The doctor said the MRI results look normal but wants to schedule a follow-up in two weeks.
Let's assign the database migration to Sarah and the frontend refactor to Mike. They should coordinate on the API changes.
We agreed to reduce the subscription price by 20% for annual plans starting next month.
The client wants us to add single sign-on support before the contract renewal in March.
I just got off the phone with the vendor and they confirmed the shipment arrives Thursday morning.
We need to file the insurance claim before the end of the week or we lose the coverage window.
The server went down at 3 AM and the on-call engineer had to roll back the last deployment.
After reviewing the proposals, we're going with vendor B because their pricing model scales better.
The school called and said Emma needs to be picked up early because she's not feeling well.
Let me walk you through the new authentication flow. First the user enters their email, then we send a magic link.
We should probably set up monitoring alerts for when CPU usage goes above 80% on the production servers.
The lease renewal is coming up in April and the landlord wants to increase rent by 15%. We need to negotiate.
I spoke with the lawyer and she said we need to update the privacy policy before launching in Europe.
The quarterly revenue is down 12% compared to last year. We need to address this in the board meeting.
HR approved the new hire for the DevOps team. They start on the fifteenth.
The user testing results came back and 70% of participants couldn't find the settings page.
We're switching from AWS to GCP for the data pipeline because the cost savings are significant.
Please make sure the release notes are ready before the all-hands meeting tomorrow.
The plumber is coming Wednesday between 10 and 2 so someone needs to be home.
Our NPS score dropped from 72 to 58 after the last update. Customers are complaining about the new UI.
The FDA approval came through this morning. We can start manufacturing next week.
I need you to review the pull request for the payment integration before end of day.
The flight to Denver is at 6:45 AM on Tuesday. The hotel confirmation number is HX-4429.
We decided to deprecate the v1 API and give customers six months to migrate.
The competitor just launched a feature that's almost identical to what we've been building.
Is anyone else having trouble with the WiFi? It keeps dropping. Yeah me too.
Okay, I think we're all here now. Let me just pull up the agenda.
The building inspector found a crack in the foundation. We need to get a structural engineer out here.
Marketing wants to increase the ad spend by forty thousand for the holiday campaign.
The patient in room 12 needs their medication adjusted. The current dosage isn't working.
We're going to need to hire two more QA engineers if we want to hit the release date.
The API response time has increased from 200 milliseconds to over 2 seconds since the last deploy.
Let's schedule a retrospective for next Monday to discuss what went wrong with the rollout.
The board voted to approve the acquisition. We'll announce it publicly next week.
I emailed the tax documents to the accountant. She said she'll have the return ready by April 1st.
We need to rotate the encryption keys before the audit next month.
The daycare said they're raising rates by $200 a month starting in September.
Customer support tickets are up 300% since the new update. We need to prioritize bug fixes.
The architect submitted the blueprints and the city is reviewing the permit application.
We should implement rate limiting on the public API to prevent abuse.
The recall affects all units manufactured between January and March. We need to notify customers immediately.
The mortgage pre-approval came through at 6.2% for a 30-year fixed.
Jake's performance review is overdue. Can you schedule it for sometime this week?
The warehouse reported that we're down to 50 units of the flagship product.
Legal says we can't use that stock photo without a commercial license.
The sprint velocity has been declining for three straight sprints. We need to figure out why.
The contractor quoted us twelve thousand for the kitchen renovation including materials.
We're planning to open a second location downtown by Q3 of next year.
Yeah yeah, mmhmm, okay, right, uh huh.
Nice weather today huh? Yeah it's been really warm lately.
Hey how's it going? Good good, you? Not bad, not bad.
Um, let me think, uh, hmm, what was I saying? Oh never mind.
Did you watch the game last night? Oh man it was crazy. That last play was insane.
Want some coffee? Yeah sure. Cream and sugar? Just black, thanks.
Sorry, one sec, let me grab that. Okay I'm back. Where were we?
Ha ha ha, that's hilarious. Oh my god. That's so funny.
Traffic was terrible this morning. Took me like an hour to get here. Yeah same.
Alright, see you later. Bye. Have a good one. You too.
Oh hey! Long time no see. How have you been? Good, real good.
[music playing in background]
[inaudible crosstalk]
Mmm this food is really good. Where'd you get it? That new place down the street.
So anyway, yeah, basically, like I was saying, um, you know what I mean?
Man I'm starving. When's lunch? I think noon. Cool.
Happy Friday everyone! Any fun plans for the weekend?
Oh that reminds me of this thing I saw on TikTok. It was so funny.
Bless you! Thanks. Allergies? Yeah, the pollen is brutal right now.
Good morning everyone. How was your commute? Not bad actually.
[TV audio in background, news anchor speaking]
Can everyone hear me okay? Give me a thumbs up. Great, let's get started.
Oh my gosh your dog is so cute! What breed is he? He's a goldendoodle.
Have you tried that new Thai place on Main Street? It's really good.
I love your shirt. Where'd you get it? Target, can you believe it?
Ugh, Mondays, am I right? Tell me about it.
Oh sorry, go ahead. No you go. No really, you first.
[phone ringing in background]
Take care! Drive safe! See you tomorrow!
Cheers everyone. Thanks for coming. Have a great rest of your day.
Yeah no worries at all. Don't even worry about it. It's all good.
Oh my god I'm so full. I shouldn't have had that second slice.
What a day. I need a drink after this. Ha, same.
[construction noise outside]
[laughter from multiple people]
Whoa, did you feel that? Was that an earthquake? I don't think so, probably just a truck.
Anyone want to grab lunch after this? I could go for some sushi. Oh yeah, that sounds good.
My phone is at 3%. Does anyone have a charger? Yeah, here you go.
I can't believe it's already March. This year is flying by.
Oh nice, new office chair? Yeah, my back was killing me with the old one.
Is the AC on? It's freezing in here. I know, right?
Morning! You look tired. Yeah, the baby kept me up all night.
Ooh, what are you eating? That smells amazing. Just leftovers from last night.
Hold on, I need to sneeze. Okay. Sorry about that.
Oh man, I just spilled coffee on my keyboard. Are you okay? Yeah it's fine.
[dog barking in background]
Hey, is that a new wallpaper on your desktop? Yeah, I took that photo on vacation.
Who wants donuts? I brought a whole box from Krispy Kreme. Oh nice, thanks!
Wow, it's already 5 o'clock. Time to head out. See ya!
